_comment: STRUCTURE verified against the live GET /v1/products/{code}/ on 2026-06-20 (the per-GSP payment-method key is 'varying' for variable products, and single+dual register coexist). RATES here are ILLUSTRATIVE round numbers, NOT real Octopus values — Octopus's ToS forbids redistributing its content, so we never commit captured Octopus rates (see ATTRIBUTION.md). Real rates are imported on-device at runtime only.
